hero.title: Ibikorwa byo kugenzura
hero.lead: IATF ikora mu ruhame byanze bikunze. Imyanzuro y'umushinga, guhindura kode, guhindura imiyoborere, n'ibiciro by'imikorere byandikwa ahantu rusange. Uru rupapuro rwerekana aho buri bwoko bw'inyandiko buba n'uburyo bwo kubisoma.

items: Ibyemezo by'umushinga. Kwemera, kubika, no guhindura ibyemezo byanditswe nk'ibibazo cyangwa ibyatangajwe mu bubiko bukwiye, kandi bisobanurwa mu ibaruramari rusange. Reba rusange igitabo cy'irangamimerereNi byiza .

Saba ibitabo by'irangamimerere. Inyandiko z'ibyifuzo rusange zibikwa mu ishyirahamwe rya IATF GitHub, kuri uru rubuga, cyangwa byombi. Inyandiko zishobora guhuza, gukosora, cyangwa kuvugurura icyifuzo cy'umwimerere kugirango ibisabwa byo kugera bishobore gusuzumwa hatagaragajwe amakuru bwite adakenewe. Imyanzuro y'amakimbirane isobanurwa mu nyandiko rusange iyo igira ingaruka ku mushinga cyangwa icyemezo cyo kuyobora. Inyandikomvugo zisabwa ntizishyirwa ku rutonde rw'imashini zishakisha aho bishoboka. Reba inyandiko: gusaba gutangaza bwa mbere birategerejwe.
Hari ibyahindutse. Buri mpinduka ya code ni impamyabumenyi rusange ku bubiko bukwiye. Reba IATF Ishyirahamwe rya GitHubNi byiza .
Impinduka mu miyoborere. Ibyavuguruwe ku rupapuro rw'imiyoborere bikurikiranwa nk'ibyiyemeje ku urubuga rwa iatf Kubona ububiko. amateka yo kohereza kuri GitHub.

Ibiciro byo gukoresha. IATF igumana ibiciro byo gukora biri hasi kandi ikandika amafaranga y'ibikorwaremezo rusange. Kuva mu mwaka wa 2022, ibiciro bikunze kugaruka ni amazina y'urubuga. Hosting yakoresheje ibikorwa remezo by'ubuntu cyangwa ibiciro bihendutse aho bishoboka. Reba igitabo cy'ibiciro bikoreshwa hepfo.
Inyandiko z'ubufatanye. Icyitonderwa ku isesengura cyangwa icyemezo cyose gihujwe kiboneka kuri GitHub Ibiganiro ku bubiko bukwiye kureba Ibiganiro ku cyemezo cy' urubuga rwa iatf ububiko.

paragraphs: IATF igumana ibikorwaremezo rusange byayo ku bushake bito. Kuva mu mwaka wa 2022, ikiguzi cy'ibanze gikunze kugaruka cyabaye amazina y'urubuga. Kubakira byakoresheje ibikorwa remezo by'ubuntu cyangwa bihendutse aho bishoboka.
Iyi nyandiko ntabwo ari inyandiko y'imari igenzurwa. Ni igitabo rusange cy'ibiciro by'ibikorwa remezo bikoreshwa mu gutuma IATF ikomeza gukora.
operatingCosts.footnote: Inyemezabwishyu zishobora kuvugwa cyangwa zisohoka nyuma yo gusubirwamo. Aderesi bwite, amakuru yo kwishyura, n'amakuru y'ibaruramari adakenewe ntabwo ari igice cy'inyandiko rusange.

items.label: Ibindi bisobanuro
items.value: Ikiguzi cya domaine cyatewe inkunga na mugiwarafx. Hosting yakoresheje ibikorwaremezo byubuntu cyangwa bihendutse binyuze muri Cloudflare. Umushinga wavuye muri Vercel ujya muri CloudFlare maze utangira gukoresha igihe gito iatf.cc icyicaro gikuru.

items.label: Icyicaro
items.value: ikigo cy'igihugu gishinzwe gukemura ibibazo by'impunzi cyitwa International Accessibility Taskforce.com

items.label: Ibindi bisobanuro
items.value: Ikiguzi cya domaine cyatewe inkunga na mugiwarafx. Kubakira hakoreshejwe ibikorwaremezo byubuntu cyangwa bihenze.

items.label: Ibindi bisobanuro
items.value: Ikiguzi cya domaine cyatewe inkunga na mugiwarafx. Hosting yakoresheje ibikorwaremezo byubuntu cyangwa bihendutse binyuze kurupapuro rwa GitHub.

paragraphs: Hari inyandiko zimwe na zimwe zitaboneka mu nyandiko za rubanda ku bw'impamvu zikurikira:
items: Umwirondoro w'abatanga ibitekerezo ku giti cyabo.
Amabaruwa y'abantu ku giti cyabo akoreshwa gusa mu gusobanura icyifuzo mbere y'uko cyemerwa, cyanga cyangwa kigasubirwamo.
Aderesi z'abantu ku giti cyabo, nomero za telefoni n'andi makuru y'ibanga atari ngombwa.
Ikintu icyo ari cyo cyose gishobora kugaragaza umuntu ukoresha ikoranabuhanga ry'ubufasha adafite uruhushya.
Ibiganiro bya Raw Discord, keretse niba ubutumwa bwihariye bwimuriwe ku bushake mu nyandiko y'umushinga rusange.

header.title: Imiyoborere ni igitabo cy'amategeko kiri inyuma y'izi nyandiko

paragraphs: Niba ushaka gusobanukirwa uburyo imishinga yemerwa, ishyirwa mu bubiko, cyangwa ihabwa indi mirimo, soma urupapuro rw'imiyoborere.
